title: Excalibur | Kobolds Support
description: A fresh look for the lizardfolk that guard the depths and their sacred minerals!
body:
![Kobold and Kobold Warrior](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dbe9ed4eb1a78a0f330504ea1b251fb3788c98a.png)

This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Kobolds](https://modrinth.com/mod/kobolds) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

Features:

*   Redesigned all items, blocks and entities.
*   Includes custom icons for Xaerominimap.

For the best experience, use this pack alongside Excalibur.

Credits:

*   Maffhew – Creator of Excalibur
*   Jusey1z – Creator of Kobolds
*   TC - Heavily inspired the weapons textures used in the project.

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-kobolds)
